input.title: NVIDIA to acquire chip-design firm Helix Semi for $4.2 billion
input.content: NVIDIA Corporation (NVDA) agreed to buy Helix Semi in an all-cash deal valued at $4.2 billion. The acquisition targets custom AI accelerator design talent. Closing is subject to regulatory review in the US and EU.

mockModelResponse.headline: NVIDIA agrees to buy Helix Semi
mockModelResponse.summary: NVIDIA announced a $4.2 billion cash acquisition of Helix Semi to bolster AI chip design, pending regulatory approvals.
